title: Odisha 10th result 2026 LIVE: Results out, 95.33% students pass exam; link to download marksheet soon
description: Odisha 10th result 2026 LIVE: Odisha board class 10 results are out. The percentage students who cleared exams is 95.33. Students can check results at bseodisha.ac.in and bseodisha.nic.in from 6 pm when links get active. Results of the Class 12 examination will be released by the third week of May.
